comment.body: GM, Alma! One suggestion, please, would you kindly formalize any your thoughts on the market(or not only market) not in threads, but in separate posts like "Intraday Post Post-Market/ Thoughts After Close". It's hard to sit in a thread where 300-500 messages and to seek  specifically your messages, unfortunately there is no option to hide all messages except yours. With all due respect, but I (and I'm pretty sure that most subscribers) are interested in reading your opinion, not the opinions of anyone else.
